name: Localo
highlight_text: Category: Local SEO & Citation Builder Tool
description:
What Localo Does?

A comprehensive local SEO tool for your Google Business Profile that helps enhance your business profile's rankings and visibility, and reaches new customers with AI-powered tasks and tools.

‍

Source: G2

‍

Features:

➡️ Tracks your Google My Business (GMB) listing's local search ranking.

➡️ Automatically monitors your business's local search ranking over time.

➡️ Helps find relevant local keywords to improve online visibility.

➡️ Manages and updates business citations across online directories.

➡️ Monitors and responds to customer reviews from various platforms.

➡️ Optimizes your GMB listing for better local search visibility.

‍

Benefits:

⭐️ Draw in new customers through continual optimization for enhanced local search performance.

⭐️ Maintain a competitive advantage by closely monitoring the local rankings of your competitors.

⭐️ Maximize efficiency and productivity with AI-driven support for local marketing tasks.

⭐️ Keep your customers up-to-date with fresh, locally pertinent updates.

⭐️ Streamline your local SEO strategies and expand operations effectively, whether you're an agency or a business owner.

⭐️ Enhance client satisfaction with transparent reporting on your efforts.

‍

Pros:

✅ Provides accurate ranking data

✅ Comes with AI integrations to create content for Google and Facebook 

✅ Affordable to use

‍

Cons:

❌ The AI integrations aren’t very great 

❌ There is a keyword limit 

❌ Limited features

‍

Priced at $29 Per Month
what_people_say:
Likes:

‍

“Localo gives small business owners a map to figuring out how to optimize their Google Business Profile and local map rankings. It's affordable and easy to use, and the weekly suggestions they provide help. I use Localo every week to manage our three small business locations.”

‍

Dislikes: 

‍

“Not Enough Keywords, Doesn't Help with Q&A on GBP.”

‍

*Review sourced and cited through G2*
